groups.label: expanding
groups.description: Paper-protocol expanding context, aquarium_then_vehicle direction, random ordering #7.

sentences.text: Beneficial bacteria colonize the biological media inside the filter and stabilize the tank nitrogen cycle.

Beneficial bacteria colonize the biological media inside the filter and stabilize the tank nitrogen cycle. A small octopus squeezed through a gap in the rocks inside the research tank and startled the intern.
